name: @orkestrel/database
description: A typed database abstraction for the @orkestrel line — a single core engine over pluggable storage drivers. Part of the @orkestrel line.

scripts.tmp:txt: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'),p=require('node:path');function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=p.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){walk(f)}else if(!e.name.endsWith('.md')&&!e.name.endsWith('.txt')){const t=f+'.txt';if(!fs.existsSync(t)){fs.renameSync(f,t)}else{console.warn('Skipping '+f+' — target exists: '+t)}}}}try{walk('tmp')}catch(e){if(e.code!=='ENOENT')throw e}"
scripts.check:src: npm run check:src:core && npm run check:src:browser && npm run check:src:server
scripts.test: npm run test:src && npm run test:guides
scripts.test:src: vitest run --config vite.config.ts --no-cache --reporter=dot --project src:core --project src:browser --project src:server
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:src
scripts.build:src: npm run build:src:core && npm run build:src:browser && npm run build:src:server
scripts.build:src:core: vite build --config configs/src/vite.core.config.ts && npm run copy dist/src/core/index.d.ts dist/src/core/index.d.cts
scripts.build:src:server: vite build --config configs/src/vite.server.config.ts && npm run copy dist/src/server/index.d.ts dist/src/server/index.d.cts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run format:check && npm run lint:check && npm run check && npm run check:src && npm run build && npm test
